metadata.description: Criar compose.yaml com serviço pxe-server: build do Containerfile local, network_mode host, cap_add NET_ADMIN, volumes para configs e tftpboot, restart unless-stopped.
metadata.goal: podman-compose para orquestrar o container PXE all-in-one com host networking e NET_ADMIN

summary: Created compose.yaml with pxe-server service: build context ., network_mode host, cap_add NET_ADMIN, volumes for config/dnsmasq.conf, config/nginx.conf, and tftpboot (all ro,z), restart unless-stopped. No ports as host networking makes them unnecessary.
